name_it: Saint Joseph Husband of the Blessed Virgin Mary
name_en: Saint Joseph Husband of the Blessed Virgin Mary
name_es: Saint Joseph Husband of the Blessed Virgin Mary
name_pt: Saint Joseph Husband of the Blessed Virgin Mary
bio_en: According to the canonical Gospels, Joseph was a 1st-century Jewish man of Nazareth who was married to Mary, the mother of Jesus, and was the legal father of Jesus.
bio_it: According to the canonical Gospels, Joseph was a 1st-century Jewish man of Nazareth who was married to Mary, the mother of Jesus, and was the legal father of Jesus.
bio_es: According to the canonical Gospels, Joseph was a 1st-century Jewish man of Nazareth who was married to Mary, the mother of Jesus, and was the legal father of Jesus.
bio_pt: Saint Joseph é uma paróquia de Barbados. Sua população estimada em 2005 era de 7.100 habitantes.
